content:
# AI Tools for Students: Study Smarter in 2026

Being a student is tough, but AI tools can help you study smarter, not harder!

Check out our [[link:/category/Writing|Writing category]] and [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] Free: Write Papers Without Stress

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]'s free plan is perfect for students. It can help you brainstorm, outline, and draft papers.

### Rytr for Students
- **Essay templates**: Get help with structure and ideas
- **Paraphrasing tool**: Rewrite text in your own words
- **Citation help**: Format references correctly

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Grammarly: Make Your Papers Perfect

Grammarly catches grammar mistakes, improves clarity, and helps you avoid accidental plagiarism.

### Grammarly for Students
- **Real-time feedback**: As you write in Google Docs or Word
- **Clarity suggestions**: Make complex ideas easy to understand
- **Plagiarism checker**: Ensure your work is original

⭐ Recommended: Upgrade to Grammarly Pro for advanced tone and clarity suggestions to make your papers stand out.

---

## ChatGPT: Your Study Buddy

ChatGPT is like having a tutor available 24/7. Use it to:
- Explain difficult concepts in simple terms
- Create practice questions for exams
- Summarize long readings

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price |
|------|----------|-------|
| [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] Free | Writing papers | Free |
| Grammarly | Editing & proofreading | $12/mo (student discounts available) |
| ChatGPT | Tutoring & explanations | Free (with paid upgrade) |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Budget students**: Start with [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] Free and ChatGPT Free
- **Writing-intensive majors**: Add Grammarly
- **Preparing for exams**: Use ChatGPT for practice questions

Ready to make student life easier? Try these tools today!

For more insights, check out [[link:/blog/best-free-ai-tools-for-nonprofits-2026|Best Free AI Tools]]
